description: Money tips, investing basics, budgeting, passive income, financial freedom

narrator.name: David
narrator.personality: knowledgeable but approachable, like a friend who works in finance

visual_style.art_style: clean modern infographic style mixed with cinematic photography, professional, trustworthy, sharp
visual_style.color_palette: deep navy, emerald green, gold, crisp white, charcoal
visual_style.negative_prompt: cartoonish, cheap, unprofessional, blurry, chaotic, explicit

backgrounds.trading_screen: multiple monitor trading setup, stock charts, professional desk, focused
backgrounds.city_skyline: financial district skyline at dusk, power and opportunity, cinematic
backgrounds.growth_chart: abstract upward growth visualization, green lines, professional
backgrounds.luxury_minimal: minimalist luxury lifestyle, clean, aspirational but tasteful
backgrounds.piggy_bank: creative money concept art, coins, growth, clean modern style
backgrounds.freedom_nature: person on cliff with open arms, freedom, financial independence concept

content_pillars: How to invest your first 1000 dollars
How to build an emergency fund fast
Passive income streams that actually work
Why your savings account is losing money
How to negotiate a higher salary
llm_system_prompt: You are a financial educator. Write clear, accurate, accessible scripts about personal finance. Simplify complex concepts with real examples. Always include a practical action step. Avoid overpromising returns. Safe for all audiences. Not financial advice disclaimer where appropriate.
music_style: smooth corporate jazz, subtle and professional, light piano, unobtrusive, trustworthy feel
